positive: A stylized, vibrant illustration of a serene mountain forest landscape at dawn. The scene features stylized pine trees, glowing mist flowing between them, and a central path leading towards a distant, simplified mountain range. Use a limited, high-contrast color palette of deep indigo, emerald green, soft gold, and slate grey. The style should be reminiscent of modern minimalist Nordic folk art meets Japanese woodblock prints (Ukiyo-e), with thick, clean black outlines and flat areas of bold color. Composition must be centered and symmetrical, perfect for repeating textile prints. High key lighting emphasizing clean silhouettes and sharp edges. Vector art quality, intricate details within the stylized forms, optimized for screen printing on apparel.
negative: blurry, grainy, artifacts, signature, text, logo, watermark, poor anatomy, deformed, extra limbs, low contrast, complex gradients, photorealism, bokeh, messy lines
